app.title: Smoke Check
app.subtitle: Just a moment of honesty.
app.check_in: Did you smoke a cigarette today?
app.how_many: How many cigarettes did you smoke?
app.urge_time: When did the urge feel strongest?
app.feel: How do you feel about it now?
app.next_time: What would you like to do differently next time?
app.reflection_placeholder: e.g. Wait 10 min before lighting up
app.tomorrow: Tomorrow is another opportunity — and you're capable of it.

feedback.choice_matters: That choice matters more than you think.
feedback.keep_showing_up: Keep showing up for yourself — it's working.

history.title: Your Week
history.subtitle: Last 7 days at a glance
history.consistency: Incredible consistency — you're proving it to yourself.
history.progress: More than half the week smoke-free. That's real progress.
history.every_day_counts: Every smoke-free day counts. Keep going.
